---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

# Loading packages

```{r}
install.packages("pacman")
```

```{r}
library("pacman")

pacman::p_load("vegan","factoextra", "FactoMineR", "ggsci", "readxl", "ggplot2", "dplyr"," ggplot2", "grid", "ggvegan", "BiodiversityR", "ggrepel","ggforce")
# data(varespec)
# data(varechem)

```

# Loading data

```{r}
LowRes_all <- read_excel("LowRes_all.xlsx")

LowRes_pig <- select(LowRes_all, 31:120)
LowRes_redox <- select(LowRes_all, 8:19)
LowRes_dia <- select(LowRes_all, 123:213)
LowRes_XRF_raw <- select(LowRes_all, 217:247)
LowRes_HSI <- select(LowRes_all, 20:26)
depth_pig <- select(LowRes_all, 1, 31:117)
age_pig <- select(LowRes_all, 3, 31:117)

LR_env_all <- read_excel("data/LR_external.xlsx")

LR_env_load <- cbind(LR_env_all, LowRes_pig)
LR_env_cl <- na.omit(LR_env_load)
LR_env_ready <- LR_env_cl[2:11]
pig_cl <- LR_env_cl[19:108]
write.xlsx(LR_env_ready, "data/LR_external_for_RDA_pig.xlsx", rowNames = FALSE, col_type ="numeric")
```
